nasb.text: Now when Joshua heard the sound of the people as they shouted, he said to Moses, “There is a sound of war in the camp.”

esv.text: When Joshua heard the noise of the people as they shouted, he said to Moses, “There is a noise of war in the camp.”

cnv.text: 約書亞聽見人民呼喊的聲音的時候，就對摩西說：“營裡有戰爭的聲音。”

ccb.text: 约书亚听见山下百姓嘈杂的喊叫声，便对摩西说：“营地里有打仗的声音。”
